body.query: source = {{index_name | default('textbench')}} | where match(Body, 'failed order') and ServiceName = 'checkout' and Timestamp >= '2025-09-23 00:00:00' and Timestamp < '2025-09-23 00:30:00' | sort - Timestamp | fields Timestamp, ServiceName, SeverityText, Body | head 100

source = {{index_name | default('textbench')}} | where (match(Body, 'connection reset') or match(Body, 'timeout')) and ServiceName = 'frontend' and SeverityNumber >= 13 and Timestamp >= '2025-09-23 00:00:00' and Timestamp < '2025-09-23 00:30:00' | sort - Timestamp | fields Timestamp, ServiceName, SeverityText, Body | head 100
source = {{index_name | default('textbench')}} | where match(Body, 'error exception failed timeout refused') | sort - Timestamp | fields Timestamp, ServiceName, SeverityText, Body | head 100
source = {{index_name | default('textbench')}} | where match(Body, 'timeout') | stats count()
source = {{index_name | default('textbench')}} | where match(Body, 'error exception failed timeout refused') | stats count()
source = {{index_name | default('textbench')}} | where match(Body, 'exception timeout failed') | stats count() as cnt by ServiceName | sort - cnt
source = {{index_name | default('textbench')}} | where match(Body, 'connection') and match(Body, 'reset') | stats count() as cnt by ServiceName | sort - cnt
source = {{index_name | default('textbench')}} | where match(Body, 'payment') and ServiceName = 'checkout' | stats count() as cnt by span(Timestamp, 1h) as hour | sort hour
source = {{index_name | default('textbench')}} | where match(Body, 'connection') and match(Body, 'reset') | stats count() as cnt by span(Timestamp, 1h) as hour | sort hour
source = {{index_name | default('textbench')}} | where match(Body, 'exception timeout failed') | stats count() as cnt, dc(TraceId) as unique_traces by ServiceName | sort -cnt
